api_key.description: Serpstat API token, sent as the 'token' query-string parameter on every JSON-RPC request (Serpstat's own auth convention -- never a header). Never logged.

base_url.description: Serpstat JSON-RPC-over-HTTP base URL override for tests or proxies.

domain.description: Domain to query for the domain_keywords/domain_competitors JSON-RPC procedures.

page_size.description: Records per JSON-RPC page (1-1000, 'size' param). Pagination stops on the first page returning fewer records than this.

pages_to_fetch.description: Number of JSON-RPC pages to fetch per read (hooks/serpstat/hooks.go's StreamHook, mirroring legacy's parsePages). 0 means unbounded (fetch until a short page).
